selections.exampleHtml:
PI 28
Feature Catalog  ·  Roadmap Initiative Group
Core Revenue Management Capabilities
Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026  ·  Executive Steering Committee
23,200
Total Hours
5
Initiatives
35
Features
Netcompany

Overall Progress
Done 7 features
In Progress 12 features
In Analysis 9 features
To Do 10 features
Priority Split
P1
P2
Must Have 55% · 21 features
Should Have 45% · 17 features
Competitive Advantage: Platform Enabling €200M+ Revenue Pipeline
Business Value
  • Enables end-to-end taxpayer lifecycle management from registration through accounting
  • Reduces manual caseworker effort via automated billing, assessments & penalty calculations
  • Directly supports Greek project delivery and future market opportunities
Market Relevance
  • Core dependency for all current and pipeline Solon Tax project implementations
  • Strengthens competitive position as a full-featured tax revenue management platform
  • €200M+ in future project pipeline contingent on platform completeness
Initiative Effort PI Window Status Priority Features
Registration
Party identifiers, org hierarchy, search enhancements
 11,866h PI 27 · PI 28 In Progress P1 14
Taxpayer Accounting
General ledger core, reconciliation & balance management
 8,064h PI 28 · PI 29 In Analysis P1 9
Billing & Assessments
Instalment plans, assessment automation, billing cycles
 2,880h PI 27 · PI 28 In Progress P2 6
Penalty & Interest
Interest calculation, credit unallocated payment segments
 TBD PI 29 · PI 30 To Do P2 4
Tax Accounts
Tax account setup, configurable thresholds, notifications
 TBD PI 29 To Do P1 2
Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 · Confidential Executive Steering Committee · 29 April 2026

agenticCustomInput:
Generate a slide for each unique initiative group found in "Estimates.xlsx". 
Ensure to include each "initiative" for the "initiative group" in the tables.
"Total hours" value for the "initiative group" can be found in the "Estimates.xlsx" where the value is in the "Initiative Group Total Hours" column.
"Effort" values for the "initiative" can be found in the "Estimates.xlsx" where the value is in the "Initiative Total Hours" column.

Dont halucinate numbers. If you cannot find or calculate them, Write [NO DATA].

Strategic Initiative: User & Third Party Access Management + Self Service Services Management
Business Value
  • Enables comprehensive representation and delegation management for taxpayers and representatives
  • Provides enhanced self-service capabilities with pre-save document uploads and form management
  • Strengthens access control through multi-level authorization schemas and lifecycle management
Market Relevance
  • Core enabler for third-party tax compliance and representation workflows
  • Improves user experience through streamlined document management and form submission
  • Supports regulatory requirements for audit trails and permission governance
